note: Created E2E test class ScrapedDuckE2ETests with 4 tests: (1) full pipeline test - mock ScrapedDuck data ingested via WireMock, stored in PostgreSQL, cached in Redis, served via API, contract shape validated for Flutter app; (2) active events endpoint verification; (3) upcoming events endpoint verification; (4) database persistence verification with cache invalidation fallback. Extended IntegrationTestFactory with optional scrapedDuckBaseUrl parameter. Tests require Docker (Testcontainers) - verified build succeeds and existing non-Docker tests pass.
